entries.summary: Analyzed Synthesis tracks, prize pools, and submission constraints to optimize for maximum prize coverage.
entries.result: Selected a multi-track strategy centered on private, delegated, receipt-driven agent execution.

entries.summary: Mapped the project to high-value tracks including Open Track, Agents With Receipts, Let the Agent Cook, Venice, Delegations, Base, and Locus.
entries.result: Created project plan and submission narrative.

entries.summary: Built a local MVP with policy config, execution timeline, receipt generation, and a dashboard.
entries.result: Generated runnable demo and receipt artifacts.

entries.summary: Ran the demo to confirm receipt generation and dashboard output.
entries.result: Verified successful run and receipt hash generation.

entries.summary: Created a public GitHub repository, prepared the submission payload, created a Synthesis draft, transferred to self-custody, and published the project.
